# CWE-331 safe — Insufficient Entropy (mitigated)
lang: go
file: CWE-331-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"crypto/rand"
	"encoding/hex"
	"io"
	"net/http"
)

type GinCtx struct {
	Request *http.Request
}

type GormDB struct{}

func (db *GormDB) Create(value interface{}) error { return nil }

func IssueRecoveryCode(c *GinCtx, db *GormDB) error {
	buf := make([]byte, 16)
	if _, err := io.ReadFull(rand.Reader, buf); err != nil {
		return err
	}
	code := hex.EncodeToString(buf)
	return db.Create(map[string]string{"email": c.Request.PostFormValue("email"), "code": code})
}
